name: 200 MG Gemcitabine Injection IP
about: 200 MG Gemcitabine Injection IP is a liquid drug type injection that contains 200mg of the active ingredient Gemcitabine. This medication is used to treat various types of cancers such as lung, breast, ovarian, and pancreatic cancer. It works by stopping or slowing the growth of cancer cells. The dosage of this injection should be taken as per the doctors recommendation. The medicine is manufactured in India and should be stored in a cool place. As an exporter, supplier, and trader, we ensure the quality and authenticity of the product.
